'''Shang stew''' was a type of [[Stew/Legends|stew]] that had a recipe.<ref name="ANHN" /> In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of the [[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'' novelization]] to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].</ref> while talking with the [[Farmer/Legends|farmboy]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] in his [[Ben Kenobi's home/Legends|hut]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] mentioned that he fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. To Skywalker, the way Kenobi mentioned his involvement was as if he was casually speaking about the recipe for shang stew.<ref name="ANHN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shang stew was mentioned in [[Alan Dean Foster]]'s [[1976]] [[Star Wars: A New Hope (novelization)|novelization]] of<ref name="ANHN" /> the [[1977]] [[original trilogy]] film, [[Star Wars: Episode IV A New Hope|''Star Wars'': Episode IV ''A New Hope'']].<ref name="ANH">{{Film|IV}}</ref>
